_readme: English base catalog (i18n_1). Namespaced by surface. `tips.*` keys are the localized tooltips every field/control carries (title / aria-describedby). To add a language: copy this file to messages/<code>.json, translate the values you want (partial is fine — missing keys fall back to these), and register the code in i18n/locales.ts.

tips.search: Search the catalog by product name, brand, or keyword.
tips.shop: Browse every product in this storefront.
tips.cart: Review the items in your cart and check out.
tips.account: Your profile, addresses, saved cards, and order history.
tips.language: Choose the language this storefront is shown in. Your choice is remembered for this session and does not change prices, currency, or tax.

home.heroSubtitle: Browse thousands of products across every category.

tips.category: Show only products in this category.

tips.browse: Browse the products published to this storefront.

tips.allTypes: Clear the product-type filter and show everything.
tips.previous: Go to the previous page of results.
tips.next: Go to the next page of results.

tips.variant: Choose the size, colour, or configuration you want. Out-of-stock variants cannot be selected.
tips.quantity: How many of this item to add to your cart (1–99).
tips.addToCart: Add the selected variant to your cart.
tips.outOfStock: This variant is out of stock and cannot be added to the cart.

cart.title: Your cart
cart.taxNote: Shipping and tax are calculated at checkout.

tips.browseProducts: Open the catalog and find something to buy.
tips.checkout: Go to checkout to enter delivery and payment details.
tips.remove: Remove this item from your cart.
tips.decreaseQuantity: Reduce the quantity by one. At one item, this removes the line.
tips.increaseQuantity: Add one more of this item.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.subtotalItems: Subtotal ({count, plural, one {# item} other {# items}})
checkout.taxNote: Choose a shipping rate before authorization; tax follows this storefront's regime — included in AU/EU prices, added at checkout for US.
checkout.signedInAs: Signed in as {email}. We use this verified account email for the order.
checkout.saveCard: Save this new card for one-click checkout later
checkout.guestPaymentNote: Guests can choose a payment option, but payment methods are not saved to an account. The order keeps the selected method and masked payment summary for audit, tracking, and notifications.
checkout.providerNote: Stripe, Apple Pay, Google Pay, PayPal, and card entry are handled by provider-hosted payment surfaces in production; raw payment credentials must not be stored by 3commerce.
checkout.usingShippingForBilling: Using the shipping address for card billing/AVS.

tips.email: We'll send your order confirmation here.
tips.savedShippingAddress: Pick a saved address to fill the fields below, or enter a new one.
tips.fullName: Full name for delivery, as it should appear on the parcel.
tips.address: Street address — number and street name.
tips.postcode: Postal/ZIP code — used to calculate shipping.
tips.country: 2-letter country code (ISO 3166), e.g. DE, US, AU.
tips.getRates: Fetch live carrier rates for the shipping address above.
tips.shippingRateChoice: Choose the carrier service to ship this order with.
tips.paymentOption: Choose how you want to pay. Payment is captured after the order is authorized.
tips.savedCard: Pay with a card you saved earlier, or enter a new one.
tips.cardNumber: Provider-hosted card entry in production; this dev field records only a masked summary.
tips.expiry: Expiry is used only by the provider in production.
tips.cvv: CVV is provider-hosted in production and never stored.
tips.saveCard: Store a provider token for this card so your next checkout is one click. The raw number is never stored.
tips.billingAddress: The address your card is registered to — used for the bank's address check (AVS).
tips.quantity: Change how many of this item you're ordering.
tips.placeOrder: Authorize payment and place the order. You'll see the confirmation next.

confirmation.confirmed: Your order is confirmed. A confirmation email is on its way.
confirmation.createAccountPrompt: Track your order — create an account
confirmation.accountCreated: Account created — check your email to verify it, then your order appears in <link>your account</link>.
confirmation.attachedToAccount: This order is attached to your account automatically.
confirmation.problemPrompt: Problem with this order? <link>Contact support or request a refund</link>.

tips.email: The address your account and order updates are sent to.
tips.password: At least 10 characters. Used only to sign in to this storefront.
tips.createAccount: Create an account so this order — and future ones — appear in your order history.
tips.testPayment: Dev only: simulates the payment provider confirming this order.

auth.registered: Account created. Check your email to verify, then log in.

tips.email: The email address you registered with.
tips.password: Your password. Never share it — we will never ask for it by email.
tips.passwordMin: At least 10 characters. Longer passphrases are stronger than short complex ones.
tips.mfaCode: The 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
tips.createAccount: Create your account and start shopping.

member.title: Title
member.marketingConsent: Keep me updated with product news and special offers

tips.title: How you'd like to be addressed. Optional.
tips.firstName: Your legal first name, as it appears on your payment card.
tips.lastName: Your legal family name, as it appears on your payment card.
tips.preferredName: What we should call you in emails and on the site, if different from your first name.
tips.phone: Used for delivery updates and, where required, payment verification.
tips.dateOfBirth: Required to verify eligibility for age-restricted items and recurring-payment services.
tips.marketingConsent: Optional. Product news and offers by email — you can turn this off at any time.

account.title: Your account
account.name: Name
account.noSavedCards: No saved cards yet. You can save one during checkout.
account.verifyEmailNotice: Verify your email address ({email}) using the link we sent you — orders you placed as a guest with that email will appear here once it's verified.
account.addressError: Could not save the address. Check the details and try again.
account.cardIntro: Test card entry is converted to a provider payment-method token before it is sent to the Payments service. Use different test card numbers to save multiple cards.
account.cardError: Could not save the card. Use a supported test card number.

tips.addAddress: Save an address so checkout is pre-filled next time.
tips.deleteAddress: Remove this address from your address book.
tips.addressUse: Whether this address can be used for delivery, for card billing, or both.
tips.fullName: The name the parcel is addressed to.
tips.addressLine1: Street address — number and street name.
tips.postcode: Postal/ZIP code — used to calculate shipping.
tips.countryCode: 2-letter country code (ISO 3166), e.g. AU, DE, US.
tips.makeDefaultAddress: Pre-select this address at checkout for its use.
tips.cardNumber: A provider test card number. It is tokenized before it reaches our Payments service — the raw number is never stored.
tips.cvv: The 3–4 digit security code on your card. Never stored.
tips.saveCard: Tokenize and save this card to your account.
tips.makeDefaultCardAction: Use this card by default at checkout.
tips.deleteCard: Remove this saved card from your account.
tips.support: Open a support ticket or request a refund for this order.

support.title: Order support
support.submitted: Your request was submitted. We'll email you with updates.
support.notRefundable: This order isn't available for a refund request.
support.selectItems: Select the items to refund (leave all unchecked to refund the whole order):

tips.reason: Pick the closest match so your ticket reaches the right team.
tips.message: What went wrong? Include anything that helps us fix it quickly.
tips.openTicket: Send this to support. You'll get an email with the ticket reference.
tips.refundQuantity: How many of this item to refund. Leave every line at 0 to refund the whole order.
tips.refundReason: Why you're requesting a refund — this is reviewed by an agent.
tips.submitRefund: Submit the refund request for review.

consent.title: We use cookies
consent.intro: Necessary cookies keep the store working. Analytics and marketing are optional and off until you allow them.

tips.necessary: Session, cart, and checkout cookies the store cannot work without. These cannot be turned off.
tips.analytics: First-party, batched page events. No third-party trackers, no session replay.
tips.marketing: Campaign attribution for offers you arrive through.
tips.rejectNonEssential: Keep only the cookies the store needs to work.
tips.saveChoices: Apply exactly the choices ticked above.
tips.privacySettings: Change these choices at any time on the privacy page.

privacy.title: Privacy & cookie settings
privacy.intro: Necessary cookies keep the store working (cart, checkout, sign-in) and are always on. Analytics and marketing are optional, off by default, and can be changed here at any time. Withdrawing analytics consent also deletes the first-party visitor id from this browser.
privacy.necessaryDescription: Session, cart, and checkout cookies the store cannot work without.
privacy.analyticsDescription: First-party, batched page events — no third-party trackers, no session replay. Off by default.
privacy.marketingDescription: Campaign attribution for offers you arrive through.

tips.necessary: Always on — the store cannot work without these.
tips.analytics: Turn first-party analytics on or off. Turning it off also deletes the visitor id stored in this browser.
tips.marketing: Turn campaign attribution on or off.
tips.saveChoices: Apply these choices to this browser immediately.
